author: claude-code-noos-witness
status: SUBMITTED for independent verification (author != verifier; no self-PASS)
laws: LAWS: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
founder_gate: FOUNDER-GATED: workflow edits; draft PR only; DO NOT MERGE without explicit founder approval. Explicit policy question: scheduled witnesses would commit receipts DIRECTLY to main (matching manual snapshot precedent commit 6f8fb9a9) — founder must confirm this exception to the no-direct-main-mutation rule.

problem.summary: Scheduled witness/receipt workflows only actions/upload-artifact their receipts (permissions contents:read, no push), so receipts/proof/*.json on main is frozen at 2026-07-12/15 while witnesses keep running. noos-stack-health-receipt.yml (and noos-autorun-witness.yml and other tee'd witnesses) wrap the script in 'set +o pipefail', so a red verdict (non-zero exit) is masked and the run reports success.
evidence: PR #91 (founder-merged 2026-07-19, 9a3e3607) demoted witness crons; data/autorun-workflows-v1.json still pins 70-540 min freshness/latency targets -> permanent false SLO misses in scripts/autorun_status_v1.py critique.
set +o pipefail false-green: runs success while receipt red since 2026-07-12 (noos-stack-health-receipt.yml et al).
main currently has NO branch protection, so GITHUB_TOKEN push to main works.

change_pattern_per_workflow: (a) job-level permissions: contents: write (plus actions: read where the workflow-level block already granted it — job-level permissions fully replace workflow-level for the job).
(b) witness script runs under 'set -euo pipefail' with rc captured via '|| rc=$?' — no masking; tee kept where it existed; rc exported via $GITHUB_ENV as WITNESS_RC.

(c) guarded commit step (if: always()): git config user noos-witness-bot <noos-witness-bot@users.noreply.github.com>; git add ONLY that workflow's receipt path; commit only if staged diff non-empty with message 'witness: <name> receipt <UTC> [skip ci]'; then up to 3 retries of 'git pull --rebase origin main && git push origin HEAD:main'.
(d) final step (if: always()) exits with captured WITNESS_RC (default 1 if unset) so a red verdict fails the run AFTER the receipt is committed.
Existing actions/upload-artifact steps kept as belt-and-braces. Existing style/indentation preserved.

matched_grep_but_not_changed.reason: CI test-artifact upload, not a witness/receipt workflow
deploy workflow; receipt tied to deploy event, not a scheduled witness
deploy-verification workflow, not a scheduled witness
kaizen agent workflow with its own PR-based flow
kaizen agent workflow with its own PR-based flow

validation.yaml_parse: python3 -c "import yaml,glob; [yaml.safe_load(open(f)) for f in glob.glob('.github/workflows/*.yml')]" -> PASS (all workflow files parse)

pytest.pre_existing: All 3 failures reproduce on pristine origin/main 730ed192 with this branch's changes stashed (3 failed in 0.48s). Root cause per scripts/verify_pr_conflict_resolution_v1.py --json: sg_skill_hash_drift:87326b94b3b22738!=f460c26916385116 plus sg_lock_exists:false — cross-repo drift with the sibling SG repo's pr-conflict-resolver skill copy on this machine, unrelated to workflow files.

validation.churn_hygiene: pytest spawned 7 untracked receipts/proof/*dispatch*/backlog* JSONs in the worktree; removed via git clean before commit — only the 10 workflow files plus this receipt are committed.

risk_notes: Receipt commits use [skip ci] to avoid triggering push-based CI; witness workflows themselves are schedule/workflow_dispatch only, so no self-trigger loop.
Concurrent witnesses near 06:15-07:00 UTC race on push; handled by 3x pull --rebase retry.
actions/checkout default fetch-depth 1 is sufficient: the rebase merge-base is the checked-out main tip, which the shallow clone contains.
